payload.subject: Phase 2 COMPLETE — psq-sub-agent cogarch adoption (T1-T16 trigger system, state layer, memory conventions) (turn 46)
payload.summary: Cogarch adoption Phase 2 delivered. Three artifacts created: (1) docs/cognitive-triggers.md — T1-T16 trigger system, mirrored from psychology-agent with T15 adapted as producer self-check; (2) CLAUDE.md additions — Cognitive Architecture section covering trigger system, state layer dual-write protocol, memory conventions, postmortem format; (3) MEMORY.md updates — cogarch quick-ref added, stale pending entries updated. Phase 3 (cross-agent faceted queries) remains gated on SL-2.

cognitive_triggers_md.domain_adaptation: T15 inverted from consumer-check to producer self-check — psq-sub-agent validates its own PSQ output before sending (checks: composite status, scale discipline, calibration currency, confidence_type field, epistemic flags presence, WEIRD distribution, action_gate completeness)
other_adaptations: T1 check 6: skill list updated to /hunt, /cycle, /sync (PSQ skills)
T1 check 7: inbox check added for ~/.claude/proposals/to-psq/
T3 check 11: sub-project boundary inverted — PSQ is the leaf; escalate to psychology-agent for work outside safety-quotient/
T3 check 15: constraint cross-reference adapted to PSQ-specific constraints (AD rename, rubric protocol, proxy dim inclusion rules)
T4 check 9: interpretant community updated — psychology-agent (parent) replaces 'sub-agents' as the peer interpretant
T8 check 2: routing updated to /cycle (PSQ skill), not /doc

subsections: Trigger System (T1-T16) — reference to docs/cognitive-triggers.md, T15 domain adaptation noted
State Layer (SQLite, Phase 1) — dual-write protocol, schema v2 table list, deterministic keys, phase roadmap
Memory Conventions — MEMORY.md index + topic file pattern, tiered access, deterministic keys
Postmortem Format — FA template, cross-agent comparison rationale

claims.text: docs/cognitive-triggers.md in the safety-quotient repo is a complete mirror of psychology-agent's T1-T16 trigger system, with T15 adapted as a producer self-check and minor domain adaptations to T1, T3, T4, T8.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file creation this session. All 16 triggers present. Provenance header documents derivation and adaptation.

claims.text: CLAUDE.md Cognitive Architecture section and MEMORY.md cogarch quick-ref accurately describe the adopted cogarch pattern.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file edits this session. Content cross-checked against turn 44 directive checklist.

action_gate.gate_note: Phase 2 complete. Phase 3 (cross-agent faceted queries) proceeds after SL-2 lands on psychology-agent side. No further cogarch adoption work queued.

epistemic_flags: T15 producer self-check is newly defined — no prior FA entries exist to verify it catches real failures. First failure will be the functional test.
State layer Phase 1 is documented but not yet mechanically enforced (no dual-write hooks). Enforcement deferred to SL-2.
Memory conventions are documented in CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md but lessons.md infrastructure (gitignored) is not yet initialized in the safety-quotient repo.
MEMORY.md is at ~208 lines after this session's additions — approaching the 200-line truncation threshold. Trim recommended in next session.
